achievements.title: Choke Real Good
achievements.description: As Lammy solo, play 6 or more notes while holding L2 and play 6 or more notes while holding R2
achievements.author: starlite

achievements.title: Sound Effecters
achievements.description: As Lammy solo, play 6 or more notes with each of the five Effecters active
achievements.author: starlite

achievements.title: In Perfect Disharmony
achievements.description: As Lammy solo, play 6 or more notes under each of the four harmony levels with the Harmonizer active (Press up/down on the D-Pad or tilt up/down on the control stick to change the harmony level)
achievements.author: starlite

achievements.title: Overbite
achievements.description: As Lammy solo, play 6 or more notes while holding up on the D-Pad with the Wah-Wah active (Hold the control stick up instead if in analog mode)
achievements.author: starlite
